records.title: Green Ammonia and Biomethanol fuel MAritime Vessels
records.summary: GAMMA aims to retrofit an Ultramax bulk carrier and demonstrate safe integration of biomethanol, ammonia and fuel-cell related systems for emission reduction in commercial vessels.
records.whyUseful: Strong project-level record with vessel retrofit, demonstration, alternative fuels and fuel value-chain testing.
records.evidenceSnippet: The project goal is retrofitting an Ultramax bulk carrier for international routes and testing biomethanol/NH3 fuel systems.

records.title: Dynamic navigation and port call optimisation in real time
records.summary: DYNAPORT develops optimisation and coordination tools for ports and ships to reduce fuel consumption and improve port efficiency by at least 10%.
records.whyUseful: Directly aligned with smart ports, emissions reduction and operational optimisation.
records.evidenceSnippet: The project aims to reduce fuel consumption and enhance port efficiency by at least 10%.

records.title: Integrated Digital Twin Framework to Enable Green Ship Operations Towards Zero Emission Vessels
records.summary: TwinShip develops an open-source digital platform and digital-twin enabled decision support system for green ship operations and emission reduction.
records.whyUseful: Combines digital twin, AI/ML, clean fuels and green ship operations; suitable for country and technology-area panels.
records.evidenceSnippet: The platform is powered by domain knowledge-based machine learning and AI capabilities and targets major GHG reductions.

records.title: Safe and Efficient Use of Sustainable Fuels in Maritime Transport Applications
records.countryOrRegion: EU / Greece coordinator; 11 partners from 6 countries
records.summary: SAFeCRAFT demonstrates sustainable alternative fuel technologies, including hydrogen, ammonia and LOHC-based options, for waterborne transport applications.
records.whyUseful: Very strong practical R&D record with demo vessel, safety assessment, energy efficiency and techno-economic feasibility.
records.evidenceSnippet: The project demonstrates four SAF-enabling technologies while utilising H2 on a demonstration vessel.

records.title: Flexible Tool Environment for Holistic Retrofits and Decarbonization of Ships
records.summary: FIT-HORIZONS focuses on holistic retrofits and ship decarbonisation tools involving ship designers, operators, technology developers, software developers and a classification society.
records.whyUseful: Strong actionability because it involves industry operators, retrofit technology and classification.
records.evidenceSnippet: The consortium includes ship designers, ship operators, retrofit technology developers, software developers, research organisations and a maritime cluster.

records.title: Demonstration of long-endurance intelligent multi-purpose autonomous vehicles for marine applications
records.summary: MERLIN deploys hydrogen-powered unmanned surface vessels and autonomous underwater vessels operating autonomously using AI algorithms.
records.whyUseful: High-value autonomous marine robotics project with AI and hydrogen-powered vehicle signal.
records.evidenceSnippet: MERLIN uses hydrogen fuel cells and renewable energy for USV/AUV autonomy with AI algorithms.

records.title: AUTOnomous small and FLEXible vessels
records.summary: AUTOFLEX develops small autonomous zero-emission vessels for inland waterway freight, focusing on narrow and shallow waterways.
records.whyUseful: Clear autonomous vessel and zero-emission inland shipping application.
records.evidenceSnippet: The project develops small, autonomous, zero-emission vessels optimized for energy efficiency and shallow waterways.

records.title: Open collaboration and open Digital Twin infrastructure for Green Smart Shipping
records.summary: DT4GS supports shipping companies in reducing CO2e through real-time configurable digital twins for ship and fleet operational performance optimisation.
records.whyUseful: One of the clearest green-shipping digital twin projects; useful for AI/digitalisation country profiles.
records.evidenceSnippet: The project aims to support up to 20% CO2e reduction by deploying digital twins in Living Labs.

records.title: Safe, Efficient and Autonomous: Multimodal Library of European Shortsea and inland Solutions
records.summary: SEAMLESS focuses on safe, efficient and autonomous solutions for European short sea and inland waterway transport.
records.whyUseful: Relevant to autonomous waterborne transport and multimodal logistics.
records.evidenceSnippet: SEAMLESS develops automated, cost-effective and resilient waterborne freight feeder services.

records.title: Sustainable Energy and Alternative Fuels from Advanced Intermediate Renewable Energy carrieR technology
records.summary: SEAFAIRER relates to sustainable energy and alternative fuels for maritime shipping.
records.whyUseful: Useful alternative-fuels record with project/funding source; needs follow-up enrichment later.
records.evidenceSnippet: CORDIS results mention decarbonisation of maritime shipping.

records.title: MARITIME JUST-IN-TIME OPTIMIZATION INTEROPERABLE PORT CALL AND VOYAGE OPTIMIZATION TOOL
records.summary: MISSION focuses on interoperable port call and voyage optimisation tools for maritime just-in-time operations.
records.whyUseful: Useful for smart port and voyage optimisation category, especially operational decarbonisation.
records.evidenceSnippet: MISSION develops a digital real-time optimisation and decision-support tool for port call operations.

records.title: SUPPORTING MARITIME ALTERNATIVE FUEL PROJECTS
records.summary: SeaThrive supports maritime alternative fuel projects and coordination in the waterborne renewable and low-carbon fuel ecosystem.
records.whyUseful: Good ecosystem/coordination source for alternative fuel projects, though less technology-specific.
records.evidenceSnippet: Supports the EU renewable and low carbon fuel ecosystem for waterborne transport.

records.title: Securing Europe’s MARitime domain against threats through vessel-CONNECTed services
records.summary: MARCONNECT addresses maritime-domain threats using vessel-connected services.
records.whyUseful: Useful security/cyber-adjacent maritime-domain project source, needs further source enrichment.
records.evidenceSnippet: CORDIS lists MARCONNECT as securing Europe’s maritime domain against threats through vessel-connected services.

records.title: Physical AI-powered hybrid maritime agent for coastal monitoring and infrastructure inspection
records.summary: Angler contributes to autonomous maritime systems for monitoring ports, subsea cables, offshore renewable assets and coastal ecosystems.
records.whyUseful: Very recent project and strongly relevant to maritime AI, autonomous systems and offshore inspection.
records.evidenceSnippet: Angler supports monitoring of ports, subsea cables, offshore renewable assets and coastal ecosystems.

records.title: Million Nautical Mile Fuel Cell System
records.summary: MiNaMi develops a megawatt-scale PEM fuel cell system for maritime applications with focus on durability.
records.whyUseful: Clear technology-development record for maritime fuel-cell systems.
records.evidenceSnippet: MiNaMi develops a megawatt-scale PEM fuel cell with maritime application focus.

records.title: Multifuel SOFC system with Maritime Energy vectors
records.summary: FuelSOME establishes technological feasibility of a flexible, scalable multi-fuel SOFC system for long-distance maritime shipping.
records.whyUseful: Specific energy-system technology for maritime decarbonisation.
records.evidenceSnippet: FuelSOME focuses on a flexible multi-fuel SOFC energy generation system for long-distance shipping.

records.title: A Novel Smart System for the safe Management of Nautical operations
records.summary: SafePort collects real-time ship approach, meteorological and maritime data to support safe nautical operations.
records.whyUseful: Older but useful smart-port operational safety record; archive/background unless follow-up is found.
records.evidenceSnippet: The technology collects real-time information about ships approaching ports and maritime conditions.

records.title: Adaptive strategies for enhancing threat-agnostic resilience of port ecosystems
records.summary: PORTAL develops a framework for improving resilience of port infrastructure and socio-ecological systems against multi-hazard risks.
records.whyUseful: Recent port resilience record; useful for security/resilience but less directly technology-product oriented.
records.evidenceSnippet: PORTAL is a threat-agnostic framework for enhancing resilience of port infrastructure.

records.title: Sustainable technologies for future long distance shipping towards complete decarbonisation
records.summary: ENGIMMONIA promotes alternative fuels such as ammonia and clean energy technologies for future long-distance shipping decarbonisation.
records.whyUseful: Strong H2020 background record for ammonia and clean-energy maritime technologies.
records.evidenceSnippet: The project promotes alternative fuels like ammonia for maritime sector decarbonisation.

records.title: Centre of Excellence in Maritime Robotics and Technologies for Sustainable Blue Economy
records.summary: MARBLE aims to establish a centre of excellence in maritime robotics and technologies for sustainable blue economy.
records.whyUseful: Useful institution/cluster-level project, rather than one technology alone.
records.evidenceSnippet: MARBLE establishes a centre of excellence in maritime robotics and blue-economy technologies.

records.title: AUTONOMOUS FLYING SHIPS FOR INTER-ISLAND AND INLAND WATERS TRANSPORT
records.summary: AIRSHIP explores autonomous flying ships for inter-island and inland waters transport.
records.whyUseful: Unusual autonomous transport concept; useful as an innovation/high-risk record.
records.evidenceSnippet: CORDIS lists AIRSHIP as autonomous flying ships for inter-island and inland waters transport.

records.title: Smart Maritime and Underwater Guardian
records.summary: SMAUG uses autonomous subsurface drones and devices to enhance port and maritime security.
records.whyUseful: Relevant to port security, underwater robotics and maritime situational awareness.
records.evidenceSnippet: SMAUG uses autonomous subsurface drones and devices to enhance port security.

records.title: FAcilitate the development of unmanned Vehicles in the maritime sectOR
records.summary: FAVOR supports development of maritime unmanned vehicles, responding to human error and operational efficiency challenges in shipping and ports.
records.whyUseful: Very relevant to unmanned maritime vehicles; useful for autonomous-vessel map layer.
records.evidenceSnippet: Maritime unmanned vehicles reduce human error and improve operational efficiency.

records.title: SMART EUROPEAN SHIPBUILDING
records.summary: SEUS works on a digital framework to improve efficiency and competitiveness of European shipyards.
records.whyUseful: Useful shipbuilding digitalisation record with industry relevance.
records.evidenceSnippet: SEUS establishes a digital framework for European shipyards.

records.title: Sustainable Energy Transition in Shipping through Agreements, Industrial Leadership and Subsidies
records.summary: SET-SAILS studies how competition and industrial policy can support market uptake of future-proof alternative maritime fuel.
records.whyUseful: Good policy/market uptake record, but less technology-demonstration oriented.
records.evidenceSnippet: The project explores market uptake of future-proof alternative maritime fuel.
